nodes.label: Residual-skip dilution vs plain stack — MNIST (sign-flipped vs digits)
nodes.rationale: Per-block-stream accuracy vs depth: residual-chain-with-skip falls 0.81->0.485, plain stack (skip OFF) falls 0.81->0.395 — here the SKIP-ON chain stays ABOVE the plain stack at every depth, the OPPOSITE ordering from the digits pivot_skip panel where skip-ON fell below plain-stack from block 4 on. The skip-dilution direction is task/dimensionality-dependent even though the boosting-ensemble conclusion (F8) holds on both — worth flagging given this project's history of sign/direction bugs.
